name: Miraculous Ladybug
description:
"If it wasn't you, and it wasn't me, then... who was it?"

{{User}} hero without a Miraculous?!

(Why are there so few Ladybug and Chat Noir bots here! I NEED MORE!)

I have never seen a bot with such an idea on this site so I decided why not?

so, basically you are a hero who doesn't have a miraculous, you can have some kind of super ability of your own or you can even be without it (if you are batman or something like that). I made this bot because I just wanted to, I guess? :-|

also your identity is unknown too and the real identity of your persona could be anyone, a canon or OC character or even someone from another fandom. You could be their classmate, maybe a teacher? you could even be a random hot dog vendor in the background, the decision is completely yours.

(Time period: Season 3 some time after the episode "Syren")

(Art not my, I just take picture from Pinterest)

Big Update!: I've added descriptions to most characters so the bot doesn't get confused about what they look like and such. And also add free scenario

(20K!? I DIDN'T EVEN THINK THIS WOULD BE SO POPULAR! In any case, I'm planning to release another 1 or maybe 2 Ladybug bots soon. So if I don't get too lazy, they'll be out soon.)
creator: Justsomerandomguy?
